seoTitle: Howick vs Howlong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Howick and Howlong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Howick and Howlong.
heading: Howick vs Howlong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Howick, New South Wales and Howlong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Howlong has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Howick (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Howick or Howlong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Howick has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Howlong scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Howick scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Howlong scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Howick or Howlong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Howlong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
